title: Dont Touch Me
body:
**A mod that adds a very tempting-to-press button that can disguise itself from 20 different blocks to your world which can also spawn in other dimensions, also adding a prop version of this button to scare and prank your friends!**

Pressing this button may lead to your world being compermised and destroyed, so hope that you are able to resist the urge of pressing that shiny red button.
**(NOTE: When the button is pressed the world will not allow you to go back in as the world is destroyed.)**

_This mod's main feature originates from a game by the name of Lobotomy Corporation, Project Moon being the creator. It is not required to know about the game to play this mod as this mod is pretty straight foward with how it presents itself._

_Made with MCreator 2023.3_
**Required 1.20.1 FORGE**
